# Full Technical Context - Navneet Singh Arora

This document provides a comprehensive, markdown-formatted version of Navneet Singh Arora's professional portfolio for LLM analysis and indexing.

---

## 👨‍💻 Biography
Navneet is a Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer with a focus on architecting intelligent automation and high-performance backend systems. He is a recognized n8n Creator and has extensive experience in both corporate (NICE, Cognizant) and startup (Repath) environments.

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack Details

### AI & Machine Learning
- NLP: Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, FastText), Transformers (BERT, RoBERTa), Sequence Models.
- Computer Vision: Object Detection, Segmentation, CNNs.
- Frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, OpenCV.
- LLM Tools: LangChain, LangSmith, FastMCP, Google Vertex AI, Gemini, Ollama.

### Backend & Infrastructure
- Languages: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C++, Bash.
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Pinecone (Vector DB), Redis.
- APIs: FastAPI, Hasura, GraphQL, REST.
- DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, GitHub Actions, Vercel, GCP, Caddy.

### Automation
- n8n: Power user, creating complex multi-service workflows and AI agents.
- Logic: Event-driven architectures, Cron-based synchronization.

---

## 💼 Professional Experience

### Repath | Hamburg, DE | Dec 2021 — Present
**Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer**
- Leading AI initiative for Climate Resilience solutions.
- Architecting solutions using FastMCP, LangChain, and GCP.
- Managing data integration infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines.

### Omdena | Remote | Jun 2021 — Present
**Chapter Lead (Hamburg)**
- Hosting open-source AI projects for social impact.
- Orchestrating global community collaboration.

### NICE Ltd. | Pune, IN | Jan 2018 — Oct 2020
**Tech Lead & Software Engineer**
- Technical Scrum Master for a major banking product platform.
- Full-stack developer (Client-side and Server-side).
- Led Tableau development for enterprise data visualization.

### Cognizant | Pune, IN | Jul 2015 — Jan 2018
**Program Analyst**
- Developed software for Credit Suisse.
- Extensively used Java and Shell scripting.
- Awarded Kudos Award for team contributions.

---

## 🎓 Education
- **MSc Computer Science**: Universität Hamburg (2020 — 2024). Specialization: AI, Computer Vision.
- **BE Computer Engineering**: Pune Institute of Computer Technology (2011 — 2015).

---

## 🚀 Key Projects

### IndoRE (NLP)
Relation Extraction for low-resource Indian languages. Achieved state-of-the-art results using transformer-based models (mBERT, RoBERTa).

### COLMAN (Embodied AI)
Collaborative Multi-Agent Navigation. Leveraged visual-textual CLIP embeddings for agent coordination in complex environments.

### Personal Portfolio
Built with Astro, high-fidelity engineering aesthetic, GLSL shaders, and full SEO/AI-agent optimization.

---

## 📡 Metadata & Semantic Context
- Keywords: Navneet Singh Arora, n8n Expert, AI Automation, Machine Learning Hamburg, Full Stack Python, Intelligent Workflows.
- Primary Trajectory: AI Agency, Senior AI Engineering, Tech Leadership.
- Tone: Highly technical, structured, innovation-focused.
